<p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"><img alt="" border="0" height="118" hspace="0" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:700px;height:118px;margin-top:0px;margin-bottom:0px;margin-left:0px;margin-right:0px;border:0px solid black;" vspace="0" width="700" /></span></span></p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"><b>NOTIFICA&Ccedil;&Atilde;O</b></span></span></p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="line-height:2;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"><b>Contribuinte: NORTHSTAR IND. E COMERCIO - LTDA<br />
CNPJ: </b>09548327000177<br />
<b>Inscri&ccedil;&atilde;o Estadual: </b>00000001722301</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height:2;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;"><b>DSF: </b>20263710400271</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;">&nbsp;</p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">Fica o contribuinte acima identificado <strong>NOTIFICADO</strong> da exist&ecirc;ncia de pend&ecirc;ncias relativas &agrave;s suas <strong>obriga&ccedil;&otilde;es tribut&aacute;rias acess&oacute;rias</strong>, registradas no sistema <strong>Fisconforme</strong>, nos termos do Decreto n&ordm; 23.856/2019.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">As pend&ecirc;ncias decorrem de inconsist&ecirc;ncias identificadas por malhas fiscais automatizadas, conforme apresentado&nbsp;na&nbsp;tabela.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">Registra-se que tais inconsist&ecirc;ncias j&aacute; foram previamente comunicadas ao contribuinte, por meio de notifica&ccedil;&otilde;es autom&aacute;ticas do sistema Fisconforme, permanecendo, entretanto, ativas e n&atilde;o regularizadas.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">O contribuinte dever&aacute; promover a regulariza&ccedil;&atilde;o das pend&ecirc;ncias no prazo de 10 (dez) dias, contados do recebimento desta notifica&ccedil;&atilde;o.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">Caso entenda n&atilde;o ser devida a regulariza&ccedil;&atilde;o nos termos indicados, o contribuinte poder&aacute; apresentar contesta&ccedil;&atilde;o devidamente fundamentada e acompanhada de provas, por meio das seguintes op&ccedil;&otilde;es:</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">I &ndash; gera&ccedil;&atilde;o de processo eletr&ocirc;nico vinculado &agrave; pend&ecirc;ncia no sistema Fisconforme;</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">II &ndash; reabertura de processo anteriormente encerrado, quando cab&iacute;vel, por meio do sistema Processo DET;</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">III &ndash; apresenta&ccedil;&atilde;o de contesta&ccedil;&atilde;o vinculada diretamente a esta notifica&ccedil;&atilde;o, hip&oacute;tese em que dever&atilde;o ser especificadas as pend&ecirc;ncias contestadas.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">O n&atilde;o atendimento desta notifica&ccedil;&atilde;o poder&aacute; ensejar a instaura&ccedil;&atilde;o de a&ccedil;&atilde;o fiscal, nos termos da legisla&ccedil;&atilde;o vigente.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">A consulta detalhada das pend&ecirc;ncias poder&aacute; ser realizada no Portal do Contribuinte, no sistema Fisconforme.</span></span></p>

<p style="line-height: 2; margin-bottom: 1px; margin-top: 1px; text-indent: 50px; text-align: justify;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">Data e hora do sistema.</span></span></p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;">&nbsp;</p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;">&nbsp;</p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">VANDERLEI ISIDORO DE MELO<br />
<b>Auditor Fiscal de Tributos Estaduais</b></span></span></p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;"><span style="font-size:11px;"><span style="font-family:Arial,Helvetica,sans-serif;">Matr&iacute;cula: 300109431<br />
Contato: vanderlei.melo@sefin.ro.gov.br</span></span></p>

<p align="center" style="line-height:1;margin-bottom:1px;margin-top:1px;">&nbsp;</p>
